page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr8i.16xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance configured on the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 6462C processor running at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The x86_64 architecture operates with a single thread per core, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead.

The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included.

This instance offers high resource density for memory-bound applications, presenting a qualitative cost-efficiency advantage for workloads requiring large in-memory datasets relative to compute capacity. The primary tradeoff is the complete absence of local storage and GPU accelerators, which limits its utility for local high-speed disk operations or hardware-accelerated machine learning. It is suited for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, enterprise applications, and memory-intensive data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr8i.16xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. Powered by an Intel Xeon 6462C processor with an x86_64 architecture, it delivers 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 512.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The instance features a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps but lacks local storage and GPU acceleration, requiring external network-attached storage for data persistence. This resource profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-heavy enterprise applications, large-scale databases, and in-memory caching workloads that do not require local high-speed disk arrays or specialized hardware acceleration.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors, high memory density, and high-speed baseline network connectivity for enterprise workloads.

512.0 GB of RAM providing a high 8.0 GB per core memory ratio
